entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'I have completed the integration of the full agentic backend into the SafeMode CLI. The C++ application now has the complete feature set of the GUI IDE, including the 44+ tools, the ZeroDayAgenticEngine, the PlanOrchestrator, and the hotpatching system.

Here

's a summary of the changes:

The build system has been updated to compile and link all the necessary production backend components into the RawrXD-SafeMode executable.
The CLI's C++ source code has been updated to initialize and use these new components.
I've added several new commands to the CLI to expose this new functionality:
mission <objective>: Starts a high-level mission with the Zero-Day Agentic Engine.
plan <objective>: Generates a step-by-step execution plan for a task.
execute_plan: Executes the last generated plan.
registry: Lists all 44+ tools in the production tool registry.
hotpatch <list|apply|revert>: Manages live hotpatches.
selftest: Runs system diagnostics.
The old, basic agentic tool system has been removed and its commands (file, git, etc.) now use the full production tool registry.
I have created a new SAFEMODE-CLI-README.md file in the project root to document all of these new commands and features.
However, I was unable to locate the rawr.ps1 PowerShell wrapper script. I searched in several likely locations but could not find it. Without this script, I cannot provide the user-friendly command-line interface that was part of the original plan.

The C++ executable RawrXD-SafeMode.exe is now fully functional, but you will need to call it directly from the command line. Once you locate or create the rawr.ps1 script, you can update it to call the executable with the new commands. Please let me know if you can provide the location of the rawr.ps1 file, and I will be happy to complete the final step of updating it.

Changed 4 files
'
